scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.build: npm run build:lib && npm run build:desktop
scripts.dev: npm run build:electron && concurrently -k "vite" "node scripts/build-electron.mjs --watch" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 dist-electron/main.cjs dist-electron/preload.cjs && node scripts/run-electron.mjs ."
scripts.dev:mcp: npm run build:electron && concurrently -k -n "vite,esbuild,electron,mcp" "vite" "node scripts/build-electron.mjs --watch" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 dist-electron/main.cjs dist-electron/preload.cjs && node scripts/run-electron.mjs ." "tsx src/mcp/corpus-server.ts"
